title: CVE-2026-50522: Microsoft SharePoint RCE
summary: [P1] Microsoft SharePoint contains a deserialization of untrusted data vulnerability, which could allow an unauthorized attack. This vulnerability is being exploited in the wild and no patch is currently available. Why now: Reported exploitation in the wild (confidence: 0.90)
classification_reasoning: This vulnerability allows for remote code execution, which is a critical impact.

title: CVE-2026-38765: Unistal Systems Pvt. Ltd. Protegent 360 Local Attack
summary: [P2] An issue in Unistal Systems Pvt. Ltd. Protegent 360 v2.0.0.4 allows a local attack. This vulnerability has not been exploited in the wild and no patch is currently available. Why now: Newly disclosed vulnerability (confidence: 0.60)
classification_reasoning: This vulnerability allows for local privilege escalation, which is a significant impact.
